patient_summary: Olivia, age 73, female (multiple source documents include a conflicting legal sex entry) with patient ID 104 and phone +1 310 556 1256. Key active problems documented: Mixed dyslipidemia (Primary) (06/30/2023), Essential hypertension, and Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus (documented 01/21/2025). Major planned procedure: COLONOSCOPY, WITH BIOPSY scheduled 02/21/2025 with Haroon, Mustafa, MD. Relevant labs: lipid panel 07/03/2023 with Triglycerides 158 (H) and VLDL 32 (H); iron studies 07/03/2023 with Ferritin 266.8 (H), Iron 41 (L), Iron Saturation 15 (L); eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) on 07/03/2023. Multiple care teams documented including Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP) and providers at Piedmont. Several social history and demographic data items conflict across sources and are preserved in the record for reconciliation.
